name: glovo-mcp
description: Local Glovo MCP server for browsing stores, searching items, reading order history, and preparing baskets. No checkout.

scripts.build: esbuild src/server.mjs --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node18 --loader:.md=text --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; import { fileURLToPath as bundleFileURLToPath } from 'node:url'; import { dirname as bundleDirname } from 'node:path'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url); const __filename = bundleFileURLToPath(import.meta.url); const __dirname = bundleDirname(__filename);" --outfile=dist/server.mjs --external:chromium-bidi/lib/cjs/bidiMapper/BidiMapper --external:chromium-bidi/lib/cjs/cdp/CdpConnection
scripts.test: node tests/session-store.test.mjs && node tests/refresh-rotation.test.mjs && node tests/order-contract.test.mjs && node tests/reorder-preview.test.mjs && node tests/error-redaction.test.mjs && node tests/browser-boundary.test.mjs && node tests/location-contract.test.mjs && node tests/basket-payload.test.mjs && node tests/basket-remove.test.mjs && node tests/basket-restore.test.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm test && npm run validate:plugin && npm run validate:mcpb && npm run pack:mcpb && npm run test:mcp && npm run test:packaged-runtime && npm audit --audit-level=high && npm run scan:secrets
